description: There is no context output for this command.

outputs.name: There is no context output for this command.
Get security events from Akamai WAF.

outputs.description: IP address involved in the attack. Akamai.SIEM.AttackData.ConfigID Unique identifier of the security configuration involved.
outputs.name: Akamai.SIEM.AttackData.clientIP

outputs.description: Unique identifier of the policy configuration involved. Akamai.SIEM.AttackData.Geo.Asn Geographic ASN location of the IP address involved in the attack.
outputs.name: Akamai.SIEM.AttackData.PolicyID

outputs.description: City of the IP address involved in the attack. Akamai.SIEM.AttackData.Geo.Continent Continent of the IP address involved in the attack.
outputs.name: Akamai.SIEM.AttackData.Geo.City

outputs.description: Country of the IP address involved in the attack. Akamai.SIEM.AttackData.Geo.RegionCode Region code of the IP address involved in the attack.
outputs.name: Akamai.SIEM.AttackData.Geo.Country

outputs.description: HTTP messege size in bytes. Akamai.SIEM.AttackData.HttpMessage.Host HTTP messege host.
outputs.name: Akamai.SIEM.AttackData.HttpMessage.Bytes

outputs.description: HTTP messege method. Akamai.SIEM.AttackData.HttpMessage.Path HTTP messege path.
outputs.name: Akamai.SIEM.AttackData.HttpMessage.Method

outputs.description: HTTP messege port. Akamai.SIEM.AttackData.HttpMessage.Protocol HTTP messege protocol.
outputs.name: Akamai.SIEM.AttackData.HttpMessage.Port

outputs.description: HTTP messege query. Akamai.SIEM.AttackData.HttpMessage.RequestHeaders HTTP messege request headers.
outputs.name: Akamai.SIEM.AttackData.HttpMessage.Query

outputs.description: HTTP messege request ID. Akamai.SIEM.AttackData.HttpMessage.ResponseHeaders HTTP message response headers.
outputs.name: Akamai.SIEM.AttackData.HttpMessage.RequestID

outputs.description: Date HTTP messege epoch start time. Akamai.SIEM.AttackData.HttpMessage.Status
outputs.name: Akamai.SIEM.AttackData.HttpMessage.Start

outputs.description: HTTP messege status code. IP.Address IP address.
outputs.name: Number

outputs.description: The autonomous system name for the IP address, for example: "AS8948". IP.Geo.Country The country in which the IP address is located.
outputs.name: IP.ASN
